title: Move content and data display widgets from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets
description: Move the content display and data visualization widgets: status indicators, metric tiles, metadata footer, progress bar, bullet sections, and CTA bar. These are the information-display showcase widgets.
context:
Files to move from pew_pew_plaza to turbo_widgets `lib/src/widgets/content/`:

- t_status_indicator.dart — Status dot with optional pulse animation. Imports: FontFamily, TDurations, TProvider (TSizes, TColors)
- t_metric_tile.dart — Large monospace number display. Needs reading.
- t_metadata_footer.dart — Dot-separated metadata row. Needs reading.
- t_progress_bar.dart — Scroll-aware gradient progress bar. Needs reading.
- t_bullet_section.dart — Multi-column bulleted list with labeled divider. Imports: FontFamily, TProvider (TSizes), TBulletItem, TLabeledDivider
- t_bullet_item.dart (supporting) — Single bullet row. Imports: FontFamily, TProvider (TSizes)
- t_labeled_divider.dart (supporting) — Labeled divider with accent line. Imports: FontFamily, context.colors, TProvider (TSizes)
- t_cta_bar.dart — Horizontal scrollable action card bar with size transitions. Needs reading.
- t_cta_bar_scrollable.dart (supporting) — Scroll container with fade edges. Imports: TCtaBarActionCard, TProvider (TSizes)
- t_cta_bar_action_card.dart — Small icon+label card with animated hover. Needs reading.

All pew_pew_plaza imports must be rewritten to turbo_widgets internal paths.

**EXCLUDED:** EntityContentSection (entity_content_section.dart) and its supporting files (content_bracket_card.dart, size_reporter.dart) are explicitly excluded from this migration. They stay in pew_pew_plaza.
instructions: Update this task status to 'in-progress' immediately.
Read ALL source files from pew_pew_plaza listed above, including t_metric_tile.dart, t_metadata_footer.dart, t_progress_bar.dart, t_cta_bar.dart, t_cta_bar_action_card.dart.
Chase any further pew_pew_plaza widget imports. Move those too.
Read turbo_widgets files from tasks 1-4 for correct import paths.
Use `cp` (Bash) to copy each source file to its target path, then use apply_edits to fix imports. NEVER rewrite files from scratch. Replace FontFamily.xxx with TFontFamilies.xxx via apply_edits.
Do NOT add exports to the barrel file — task 9.
acceptance_criteria: All content/data widgets exist in lib/src/widgets/content/
entity_content_section is NOT moved — it stays in pew_pew_plaza
t_bullet_section, t_bullet_item, t_labeled_divider exist as a group
t_cta_bar, t_cta_bar_scrollable, t_cta_bar_action_card exist as a group
No file imports anything from pew_pew_plaza
constraints: CRITICAL: Use `cp` to copy source files from pew_pew_plaza to target paths, then use apply_edits to fix imports. NEVER rewrite files from scratch — agents hallucinate content when rewriting. Copy first, patch imports second.
goals: All content display widgets are self-contained in turbo_widgets
worklog: Copied 11 files via cp, then patched imports with apply_edits. Files created: lib/src/widgets/content/t_status_indicator.dart (3 import fixes + 1 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/content/t_metric_tile.dart (2 import fixes + 3 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/content/t_metadata_footer.dart (1 import fix + 4 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/content/t_progress_bar.dart (5 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/content/t_bullet_section.dart (2 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/content/t_bullet_item.dart (2 import fixes + 1 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/content/t_labeled_divider.dart (3 import fixes + 1 FontFamily→TFontFamilies), lib/src/widgets/content/t_cta_bar.dart (3 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/content/t_cta_bar_scrollable.dart (2 import fixes), lib/src/widgets/content/t_cta_bar_action_card.dart (3 import fixes), lib/src/models/list_progress_model.dart (straight copy, zero imports). All diffs verified — only import lines and FontFamily→TFontFamilies changes. Zero pew_pew_plaza imports remain.

on_complete.update_downstream_tasks: Record all supporting files moved beyond the listed ones. Add paths to task 9.
